Generic N-dimension admission filter. Missing or non-finite thresholded scores reject.

## Import

```ts
import { admissionScored } from "@graphrefly/ts/patterns";
```

## Signature

```ts
function admissionScored(opts: AdmissionScoredOptions<Dims, TRaw>): (raw: TRaw) => boolean
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `AdmissionScoredOptions<Dims, TRaw>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `(raw: TRaw) => boolean` value.

## Example

```ts
import { admissionScored } from "@graphrefly/ts/patterns";
```
